channel.title: Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Meziantou.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: New features and Roslyn analyzers for Meziantou.Framework.FullPath
item.description: A few years ago, I introduced , a library to ensure you always deal with full paths in your applications and provide common methods to manipulate them easily. Recently, I've added new features to the library, including new methods and a set of Roslyn analyzers to help you use the library correctly. The main idea of FullPath is to avoid bugs related to relative paths by forcing the use of absolute paths…
